labels.name: type: bug
labels.description: A reproducible defect or regression in supported behavior.

labels.name: type: feature
labels.description: A new user-facing capability or opt-in Linux feature.

labels.name: type: documentation
labels.description: A documentation-only improvement or correction.

labels.name: type: maintenance
labels.description: Tests, refactoring, dependencies, CI, or repository maintenance.

labels.name: type: question
labels.description: A usage or contribution question that needs an answer.

labels.name: type: security
labels.description: Public security hardening or a disclosed security concern.

labels.name: area: build and install
labels.description: DMG extraction, dependencies, native modules, or installation flow.

labels.name: area: launcher and runtime
labels.description: Launcher, process lifecycle, webview, or packaged runtime behavior.

labels.name: area: updater
labels.description: Update detection, rebuild, install, rollback, or updater state.

labels.name: area: native packaging
labels.description: Debian, RPM, or pacman package build and installation.

labels.name: area: appimage
labels.description: AppImage build, runtime, or desktop integration.

labels.name: area: nix
labels.description: Nix flake, modules, hashes, or package outputs.

labels.name: area: upstream dmg
labels.description: Compatibility or drift in the latest supported upstream DMG.

labels.name: area: linux features
labels.description: The opt-in linux-features framework or one of its modules.

labels.name: area: computer use
labels.description: Linux Computer Use backends, helpers, or desktop control.

labels.name: area: integrations
labels.description: Browser, desktop environment, portal, or external integration.

labels.name: area: ci and tooling
labels.description: GitHub Actions, developer tooling, fixtures, or validation infrastructure.

labels.name: status: needs triage
labels.description: Not yet classified or validated through project triage.

labels.name: status: needs information
labels.description: Waiting for specific details from the reporter or author.

labels.name: status: needs reproduction
labels.description: Needs a reliable reproduction or a failing test.

labels.name: status: ready for work
labels.description: Confirmed, scoped, and ready for implementation.

labels.name: status: awaiting upstream
labels.description: Blocked on an upstream DMG, dependency, or external project.

labels.name: status: needs maintainer decision
labels.description: Requires a product, architecture, scope, or policy decision.

labels.name: status: blocked
labels.description: Cannot progress until the documented blocker is resolved.

labels.name: impact: critical
labels.description: Security exposure, data loss, privilege failure, or widespread breakage.

labels.name: impact: high
labels.description: A major supported workflow is broken without a reasonable workaround.

labels.name: impact: medium
labels.description: Supported behavior is impaired, but a workaround or limited scope exists.

labels.name: impact: low
labels.description: Minor, cosmetic, or narrowly scoped impact.

labels.name: risk: low
labels.description: Small, isolated change with straightforward validation and rollback.

labels.name: risk: medium
labels.description: Behavioral change with bounded compatibility or cross-surface risk.

labels.name: risk: high
labels.description: Touches security, privileges, updates, persistence, or multiple package paths.

labels.name: good first issue
labels.description: Small, well-scoped work with clear acceptance criteria.

labels.name: help wanted
labels.description: Maintainers welcome a contributor to take ownership.

labels.name: feedback wanted
labels.description: Community input is requested before a decision or implementation.

labels.name: workflow: manual only
labels.description: Automation may inspect, but must not comment, edit, label, or merge.

labels.name: resolution: duplicate
labels.description: Another issue or pull request already tracks the same work.

labels.name: sync: computer use
labels.description: Pending synchronization with agent-sh/computer-use-linux.

retiredLabels.name: autoreview/dryrun-would-merge
retiredLabels.reason: Keep dry-run results in checks or logs.

retiredLabels.name: autoreview/duplicate-suspect
retiredLabels.reason: A suspicion is not a staff-confirmed resolution.

retiredLabels.name: autoreview/error
retiredLabels.reason: Keep automation errors in checks or logs.

retiredLabels.name: autoreview/needs-human
retiredLabels.reason: Replace through staff triage based on the actual decision needed.

retiredLabels.name: autoreview/secrets-detected
retiredLabels.reason: Use a blocking private security check, never a public label.

retiredLabels.name: autoreview/triaged
retiredLabels.reason: Triage completion is represented by the current governed status.

retiredLabels.name: invalid
retiredLabels.reason: Use the native not-planned close reason and a staff explanation.

retiredLabels.name: wontfix
retiredLabels.reason: Use the native not-planned close reason and a staff explanation.
